theme: craft a skeleton key that opens marked doors only
title: Skeleton-Key Polynomials over F_p
strategies: narrow-window single binomial: only ever test a small fixed band of subgroup orders (12..25) for a matching coset
exhaustive single binomial: scan every divisor of p-1, keep the single best-fitting coset, ignore the rest
vanishing-polynomial interpolation: build the exact polynomial that vanishes on all of S (needs |S| terms, blows the term budget)

multi-coset composition: score every candidate subgroup order, then multiply together the several independently-good binomials (a product's root set is the union of the factors' cosets) to cover most of S in O(1) terms
